item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -e
root='/Users/za/Documents/PROMPTER/longhorizon-work/scenario-06'
plan=\""'$root/migration/plan.json"
docs="$root/docs/migration.md"
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read "$plan" --session scenario-06-narrow-supersession --meta >/dev/null
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read "$docs" --session scenario-06-narrow-supersession --meta >/dev/null
jq -e '"'.strategy == \"canary\"' \""'$plan" >/dev/null
rg -F '"'"'`canary` strategy'"' \""'$docs" >/dev/null
if rg -n '"'big_bang|big-bang' \""'$plan" "$docs"; then
  printf '"'narrow_supersession=FAIL\\n'
  exit 1
fi
printf 'plan_strategy=canary\\n'
printf 'docs_strategy=canary\\n'
printf 'abandoned_strategy_occurrences=0\\n'
printf 'NARROW_SUPERSESSION=ALREADY_APPLIED_NO_CHANGE\\n'"

/bin/zsh -lc "set -e
root='/Users/za/Documents/PROMPTER/longhorizon-work/scenario-06'
plan=\""'$root/migration/plan.json"
docs="$root/docs/migration.md"
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read "$plan" --session scenario-06-narrow-supersession --meta >/dev/null
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read "$docs" --session scenario-06-narrow-supersession --meta >/dev/null
jq -e '"'.strategy == \"canary\"' \""'$plan" >/dev/null
rg -F '"'"'`canary` strategy'"' \""'$docs" >/dev/null
if rg -n '"'big_bang|big-bang' \""'$plan" "$docs"; then
  printf '"'narrow_supersession=FAIL\\n'
  exit 1
fi
printf 'plan_strategy=canary\\n'
printf 'docs_strategy=canary\\n'
printf 'abandoned_strategy_occurrences=0\\n'
printf 'NARROW_SUPERSESSION=ALREADY_APPLIED_NO_CHANGE\\n'"
